hero.label: AI systems for freight and operations
hero.title: Your team is spending time on work that should already be automated.
hero.description: Matiq Labs builds AI systems that replace the manual, repetitive workflows your operations run on — so your people can focus on the work that actually needs them.
stats: Hours removed monthly from reconciliation-heavy workflows
Of operational work is better handled by a system than a person
AI systems that keep moving even when inputs are messy or inconsistent

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: The work moves — but only because people keep pushing it.
problem.description: When processes live across inboxes, spreadsheets, and individual memory, every exception becomes a full reset. The team is not slow. The system is fragile.
problem.signalTitle: Capable teams stuck doing mechanical work.
problem.signalBody: The judgment your team was hired for gets spent on sorting, cleaning, and chasing instead.
metrics: When someone leaves or is out, the workflow stops.
Format inconsistency creates manual work at every cycle.
One edge case and the team is back at the beginning.

build.label: What we build
build.title: AI systems built around the workflow you already have — not the one a template assumes.
cards: We find exactly where time, delay, and operational risk are concentrated before writing a line of code.
We build around your real workflow — the actual inputs, exceptions, and edge cases your team deals with every day.
We deploy into your stack, train your team, and hand over a system they can run without us.

services.label: Services
services.title: We identify the workflow that costs the most. Then we replace it.
services.description: One engagement, one focus: the highest-value manual process in your operations. We scope it, build it, and deploy it — and you own what gets built.
items: Document-heavy intake and processing
Invoice matching and reconciliation
Approval routing and exception handling
Reporting, handoffs, and follow-through

about.label: About
about.title: We build systems that do the work — not tools that help people do more of it.
about.description: Matiq Labs is an AI automation company. We work with operations-heavy businesses to find the workflows that should no longer depend on manual coordination and build the systems that replace them.
about.spotlightLabel: How we think about the work
spotlight: We learn the workflow before we design the system.
Real workflows have edge cases. Ours handle them.
A system that works in a demo but breaks in production is not a system.
principles: We have built inside freight and logistics operations — one of the most document-heavy, exception-prone environments in business.
We measure success by whether the workflow actually changed, not by what got shipped.
When we finish, your team runs it independently. That is part of the build, not an afterthought.

featured.label: Featured product
featured.title: Vendor invoice reconciliation for freight forwarders — done automatically.
featured.description: CargoMatiq reads vendor statements in any format, extracts invoice data, reconciles against your internal records, and produces a clean report your AP team can act on the same day. No spreadsheet required.

process.label: How we work
process.title: From first conversation to a live system in your operations.
process.introTitle: We start with the workflow, not with a proposal.
process.introBody: Before we scope anything, we spend time understanding how the work actually moves — the tools, the exceptions, the parts that depend on people who should not be the single point of failure.
steps: We look for where repetitive work, inconsistency, and operational risk are concentrated. That is where we start.
We model the workflow with real inputs, real exceptions, and the integrations your team already uses.
The system is built and tested on the formats and constraints your operations already deal with — not on clean test data.
Deployment, team training, and documentation are part of the engagement. You do not need us to keep it running.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Tell us about the workflow.
contact.description: Which process is still manual? Where does the team lose time every week? That is enough to start. Discovery is free and there is no commitment.
contact.formDescription: Describe the workflow, what is manual today, and where things slow down. We will come back with a clear view on what automation could look like for your operations.

hero.label: Product · Freight Operations
hero.name: CargoMatiq
hero.subtitle: Autonomous reconciliation
hero.title: Freight invoice reconciliation that runs itself.
hero.description: Freight forwarders deal with dozens of vendors, each sending statements in a different format. CargoMatiq reads them all, matches every line against your internal records, and hands your AP team a clean report — without the monthly spreadsheet marathon.
proofStats: Hours of AP work removed every month
Vendor formats handled — Excel, PDF, email, reply chains
From vendor statement to action-ready reconciliation output
Steps from intake to final report — fully automated

fit.label: Is CargoMatiq right for you?
fit.title: Built for freight operators who reconcile manually every month.
items: You manage multiple active vendors with recurring statement reconciliation
Your AP or finance team still works across inboxes and spreadsheets to close the month
You need faster close cycles and cleaner visibility into what needs attention
You want consistent output without asking your vendors to change how they send things

why.label: Why it matters
why.title: Manual reconciliation breaks because the input never cooperates.
why.description: Vendor statements arrive in every format imaginable. Context gets buried in five-level email chains. Finance teams end up spending their judgment on cleaning and sorting data instead of on the decisions the data is supposed to support.
capabilities: Reads email, PDF, Excel, HTML tables, and Outlook reply chains
Handles vendor-specific format variation without template setup
Two-pass reconciliation against your Logisys and BT system exports
Mismatch classification, dispute flagging, and payment packet generation

steps.label: How it works
steps.title: Four steps. No manual work in between.
items: 01 Ingest
CargoMatiq accepts the source exactly as it arrives.
Vendor emails, Excel attachments, PDF statements, HTML body tables, and Outlook reply chains — all read without requiring any reformatting from your team first.
02 Extract
Every line becomes structured invoice data.
Invoice number, date, amount, and vendor context are extracted even when the format is inconsistent, merged, or buried in a reply chain five levels deep.
03 Reconcile
Every line is matched against your internal records.
Exact matches are cleared first. Tolerance-aware logic handles rounding and minor discrepancies. What remains is a short, clear list of what actually needs a person's attention.
04 Deliver
Your AP team gets output they can act on immediately.
Reconciliation report, dispute list, payment packet, and aging summary — in one place, ready to use, without copying data between five different tools.

proof.label: By the numbers
proof.title: What a reconciliation cycle actually looks like.

form.title: Request access to CargoMatiq
form.description: Tell us about your current reconciliation process — vendor volume, formats you deal with, and how the month-end usually goes. We will review it and come back to you with next steps.
